message:
refactor(codegen): Add auto-closing helpers to eval.zig and dynamic_attrs.zig

Migrate verbose builder pattern blocks to use emitConst/emitFmtConst
helpers for cleaner, more maintainable code generation:

- eval.zig: Simplified genComptimeEval, genEval, genExec with helpers
- dynamic_attrs.zig: Simplified genGetattr, genSetattr, genHasattr,
  genVars, genGlobals, genLocals, genDir with helpers

This reduces boilerplate and prevents parenthesis/brace mismatches
by using consistent helper patterns across the codebase.
